baseline.observed: Empty prompt returned Ok(local_improvement(...)) with warning: Empty prompt; local fallback returned the improvement checklist only.
The CLI already rejected empty prompts before calling improve_prompt_inner.

observed_weaknesses: The backend/Tauri API boundary still treated empty improve input as a successful improvement result.
Direct callers could receive a checklist-style success response for an invalid prompt.

selected_candidate.name: API empty improve rejection
selected_candidate.reason: Align the backend improvement API with the CLI fail-closed behavior.
selected_candidate.success_metric: improve_prompt_inner returns an error for empty or whitespace prompts; force-local non-empty improvement still succeeds.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
A new async unit test covers empty prompt rejection.
The existing force-local happy path was rerun.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
